project_dir.description: Absolute path to a project directory containing YAML specs (e.g. pages/wiki/).

site_dir.description: Output directory for compiled HTML. Defaults to {project_dir}/.site/

force.description: Force rebuild all specs regardless of content hash.

section.description: Only build specs in this section (e.g. 'billing'). Omit to build all.

spec_key.description: Build a single spec by key (e.g. 'billing/dunning.yaml'). Overrides section.

compiled.description: Number of specs compiled this build

reconciled.description: Number of stale HTML files deleted
